prestazioni: Engine swap to a 6.75L L410 V8 (original engine code) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Cosworth Engineering for 550+ HP reliability at 6,500 RPM

Custom forced induction via a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (1.28 A/R turbine housing) with a bespoke air-to-water intercooler system by Bell Intercoolers, paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust featuring MagnaFlow 304SS mufflers and a secondary catalytic converter delete (for track use only)

Full standalone Motec M150 ECU with individual cylinder fuel control, dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps, and a custom wiring harness by Painless Performance, integrated with a Nitrous Express Gen-X direct-port nitrous system (150-shot) for on-demand power
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using a modified Rolls-Royce Phantom VI rear quarter panel kit (hand-formed aluminum over steel framing) with carbon fiber fender flares from Liberty Walk’s ‘LB Works’ division, retaining the original Spirit’s chrome accents

Bespoke 22-inch forged alloy wheels by BBS (LM-R design) with a staggered fitment (265/35 front, 305/30 rear) wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires, paired with a custom air suspension system by Air Lift Performance (3P management) for adjustable ride height

Full custom coachbuilt front bumper with integrated DRLs (Osram LED modules) and a carbon fiber splitter by Vorsteiner, complemented by a handcrafted stainless steel mesh grille (replacing the Spirit’s iconic grille) and a custom rear diffuser by Novitec’s ‘N-Largo’ division
